turns.content:
You are a subagent: gsd-executor. Create ALL remaining hm-* agent files for Phase 24.1.

## CONTEXT
Already created (8 agents) in .hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring/:
- hm-executor.md, hm-verifier.md, hm-planner.md, hm-plan-checker.md
- hm-project-researcher.md, hm-phase-researcher.md, hm-synthesizer.md, hm-codebase-mapper.md

Read for reference:
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring/hm-executor.md (to see format)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.1-agent-hierarchy-restructure/24-CONTEXT.md

## AGENTS TO CREATE (22 new files in .hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring/)

### Research Domain
1. hm-architect.md - Technical architecture design, ADRs. Produces ARCHITECTURE.md, ADR-*.md
2. hm-pattern-mapper.md - Code pattern mapping for new files. Produces PATTERNS.md
3. hm-roadmapper.md - Phase breakdown, requirement mapping. Produces ROADMAP.md

### Implementation Domain
4. hm-code-reviewer.md - Adversarial code review, spec compliance. Produces REVIEW.md
5. hm-code-fixer.md - Apply review fixes atomically. Produces REVIEW-FIX.md
6. hm-integration-checker.md - Cross-phase integration, E2E flow check. Produces integration report
7. hm-debug-session-manager.md - Multi-cycle debug session orchestration. Produces debug session, checkpoints
8. hm-debugger.md - Bug investigation, root cause analysis. Produces DEBUG.md
9. hm-security-auditor.md - STRIDE threat model verification. Produces SECURITY.md

### Documentation Domain
10. hm-doc-writer.md - Documentation authoring. Produces project docs
11. hm-doc-verifier.md - Factual claim verification against code. Produces JSON verification

### Profiling Domain
12. hm-user-profiler.md - Developer behavioral profiling. Produces PROFILE.md

### Cross-Cutting Domain
13. hm-intent-loop.md - Intent clarification Q&A. Produces INTENT.md
14. hm-ecologist.md - Feature dependency mapping. Produces ECOSYSTEM.md
15. hm-shipper.md - Release coordination. Produces CHANGELOG.md
16. hm-specifier.md - Spec-driven authoring. Produces SPEC.md
17. hm-nyquist-auditor.md - Nyquist validation gap filling. Produces VALIDATION.md
18. hm-intel-updater.md - Codebase intelligence writing. Produces .planning/intel/*.json

### UI Domain (optional)
19. hm-ui-researcher.md - UI design contract creation. Produces UI-SPEC.md
20. hm-ui-checker.md - UI design contract validation. Produces BLOCK/FLAG/PASS verdict
21. hm-ui-auditor.md - 6-pillar visual audit. Produces UI-REVIEW.md

### Core
22. hm-orchestrator.md - L0 front-facing. Updates mode: all, hidden: true, removes old permissions/tools/steps/color

## CORRECT FORMAT
```yaml
---
description: >
  [One sentence role. One sentence artifact. One sentence spawn condition.]
mode: all
hidden: true
---

[Role: what this agent does]
[Artifacts: what files it creates/updates]
[Execution flow: steps to follow]
[Deviation rules: edge case handling]
[Success criteria: completion definition]
```

DO NOT include: name field, tools, permission, temperature, steps, color.

## RULES
- Create NEW files - do NOT modify existing files in .opencode/agents/
- Write ALL files to .hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring/
- Commit after each batch (5-6 agents per commit)
- FIRST read the existing hm-executor.md for exact format reference
I'll start by reading the reference files to understand the exact format and context.
Let me check what already exists in the refactoring directory.

Good. I have the context. I can see the 8 existing hm-* files (non-l2-prefixed) and need to create the remaining 22. Let me create them in 5 batches, committing after each.

**Batch 1: Research Domain (hm-architect, hm-pattern-mapper, hm-roadmapper)**
Let me verify all 22 files were created correctly.
